subject: fix(polish): add responsive fixes, toast feedback, input validation, and docs
body:
Polish Phase 1 for production readiness:
- Toast notifications on project/agreement/module creation
- Modal responsive fix (doesn't touch screen edges on mobile)
- Breadcrumb overflow scroll for long paths on mobile
- Module editor header wraps on small screens
- Input maxLength limits (100 for titles, 500 for descriptions)
- Module editor key reset when navigating between modules
- Fade-in animation for toast component
- Updated README with setup instructions and tech stack
- Updated USER_GUIDE.md with full feature walkthrough
- Updated TESTING_GUIDE.md with 9 test scenarios + regression checklist

Tags: polish, responsive, ux, documentation
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: phase-1-foundation
Semver: patch
